title: Stellar GUI Buttons
description: A Minecraft Bedrock inspired reimagining of the Java GUI buttons, to make them look not bad! Not only are they cleaner and smoother, but they pop more!
body:
## Stellar GUI Buttons reimagines the Java buttons, inspired by the Bedrock style!
![Image that says "Now... The Goods:.](https://i.imgur.com/5pAYeAL.png)
#
Everything in this pack works from the latest version down to 1.8.9 and probably below, but 1.8.9 is the lowest version that will ever be supported.

#

Stellar Buttons has built-in support for multiple mods! **<u>All mods are optional</u>**. 

<details><summary>List of supported mods</summary>

- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)
- [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi)
- [(JEI) Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Figura](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura)


Want support for another mod to be added? *Ask on the [Discord](https://discord.gg/hQqx2mqMz8)!*

***All mods are <u>NOT</u> required for this pack to function.***

</details>

#
*Want to talk? Check out our Discord! You can also check out the Trello for a list of what's planned!*

[![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/cM7O9mZ.png)](https://discord.gg/hQqx2mqMz8) [![Trello](https://i.imgur.com/HlOGeHe.png)](https://trello.com/b/qqx0Nr14/minecraft-stellar-tweaks)

## <u>Q & A</u>

<details><summary>Does this work?</summary>

Why don't you try it? Go on. You know you want to.

</details>

<details><summary>What do I do if something is broken? </summary>

Report it on the [Discord](https://discord.gg/hQqx2mqMz8)! 

</details>

<details><summary>Will you add support for <X> mod???</summary>

Ask on the [Discord](https://discord.gg/hQqx2mqMz8) and the answer will 99% of the time be yes! We love adding support for new mods.

</details>

# ARR License Exceptions

<details><summary>License Exceptions</summary>

- You may add this resource pack to modpacks, but it must NOT be modified* and credit must be directly and clearly given in the description in the form of a clear link to the [source](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellar-gui-buttons) on Modrinth.

*unless said modifications are directly approved by us, which may be asked for on the [Discord](https://discord.gg/hQqx2mqMz8).

*You can always just make a custom pack and override features via load order, in most cases there is no need to modify our pack unless you are editing sprite assets in which case yes you must ask for approval.

- If you're using our pack in a video please add a link to it in the description if possible.

- You may NOT smell the textures.

- We reserve the right to revoke any priveleges given for any reason.

*Everything we have written here precedes any exceptions given inside any version of the pack itself*

*Any exceptions not written here but included inside the pack itself should be considered not applicable, now null and void.*

</details>

# 

[![Just look at the gallery already. Please. I beg of you.](https://i.imgur.com/REwTqjw.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellar-gui-buttons/gallery)

[![Also try Stellar Tweaks!](https://i.imgur.com/gNTGgYH.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellar-tweaks)

#

The shader used in some screenshots is [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) using [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) in [Minecraft Java Edition](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us)
